features.name: Project Scaffold
features.description: Set up FastAPI project with dependency injection, logging, health check endpoint, and Docker dev environment
features.evidence: pytest: 23 tests pass. docker compose up succeeds. health endpoint returns 200.

features.name: User CRUD Endpoints
features.description: Implement REST endpoints for user management: create, read, update, delete with input validation and SQLAlchemy models
features.evidence: pytest tests/api/test_users.py: 18 tests pass. Manual: POST/PUT 422 on invalid input confirmed.

features.name: Rate Limiting Middleware
features.description: Add token-bucket rate limiter as ASGI middleware with per-endpoint configuration and Redis-backed counters
features.evidence: Middleware class done. Redis integration working. Working on: per-endpoint config parsing from YAML.

features.name: Audit Logging
features.description: Capture all state-changing API calls with actor, timestamp, endpoint, and diff payload to PostgreSQL audit table

features.name: OpenAPI Client Generation
features.description: Auto-generate TypeScript client SDK from FastAPI OpenAPI schema and publish as npm package
